titleStmt.title: SII 24.58: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 58. (A.R. No. 15 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase from the temple authorities by Rājarājaṉ Madhurāntakaṉ alias Vatsarāja for worship and offerings to God Aḻagiya maṇavāḷap-perumāḷ on the day of his natal star Mṛigaśīrsha and for feeding Śrīvaishṇavas in the Madhurāntakadēvaṉ-maṭha during certain specified festivals. The record is dated in the 15th year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tan nemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jeyamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir
munaik kon=taḷavaraicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvalikāṭṭip porp paṟi naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭi tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponṉiyāṭaiyum nannilappāvai tanimaiyun taviravantu
punitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu tiruniḻal ve
ṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟ tivān=tarattu pūpālar tiṟaiviṭuppitta kalañcori(ya) kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅkiya tenṉavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭa tan pon nakarp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinṉāḷ piṟku
lappiṟai pol niṟpiḻaiyennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalaṅ kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭut tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu veṅ kaṉum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟuviṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟiṉa viramuṅ kiṭa
ppa yeṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalilun talaivirit talamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷukantu tānun tānaiyum panṉā ḷiṭṭa palapalamutukum payantetir māṟina jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pu
kaḻin celviyum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭuttaveṅkariniraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇavennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruviḷattaṭaittaveḷḷavaru pariytaḷaṅka
ḷum poruparittalaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatu pola tan peruñceṉaiyai yevip pañcavaraivarum poruta porkaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai
vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura meṟṟiya koṟṟa vijaiya(ja)stampam ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttincalāpamum muttamiḻ potiyalum mattaveṅkaripaṭumaiyyaṟcaiyyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷiya tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭiya kuṭamalai nāṭṭu Oḷi cāveṟellān tanivicu
m peṟa māveṟiya tan varuparittalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟalkoḷ siṅhāsana n=tirittaruḷi poṅkoḷi* Āramum tiruppuyattalaṅkalum polaviramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai mevalar va
ṇaṅka viṟṟirun=taruḷiya koviraājakeśarivanmarāna cakravarttikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu pāṇṭikulācanivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevarkku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa Atikārikaḷ niṣatarājar Evalpaṭi .
śrīvaiyiṣṇavavāriyam cempiyan mātevi Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa caṇpakanārāyaṇanampiyum perumpuliyūr tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyā nampiyum kāñcikkuṟi vaṭakopuramuṭaiyānampiyum coḻakulapa
kaccaruppetimaṅkalattu cirāmanampiyum śrīviranārāyaṇaccaru śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan kurukaikāvalan Ārāvamutum Āritan tiruvāykkula muṭaiyān cirākavanum tan kecuvan Aṟivariyānum Āritan kecava(�)
n taniyiḷañciṅkamum pāratāyan Ārāvamutuccirāmanum sabhaikkaṇakku peruppūṟak kaṭal vāmaṉan Āna periyakoyilpiriyanum śrīvaiyiṣṇava kaṇa kkut tiruvaraṅkatevan Ārāvamutāna patineṭṭunāṭṭu śrī vaiyiṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvārkanmikaḷom Irājarā
jan maturān=takanāna vaṟsarājarkku nāṅkaḷ vittukkuṭutta nilamāvatu keraḷān=ta kavaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkatevar tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna taṇṭuṟaiyilum kāraikkuṭiyilum Āṟuṭaintu maṇaliṭṭu nūṟu sammaṟsarattin Uṟtecappaṭi
payireṟintu pāḻ kiṭanta koḷḷum paruttiyum ḷaintu varukiṟa punceynilattu Ivarkku nāṅkaḷ vittuk kuṭutta nilattuk kicain=ta kiḻpārkkellai taṇṭuṟai maṇaliṭṭukku merkkum tenpārkkellai jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻac cenāmuka muven=taveḷār Anupa
vamāy van=ta nirnilattukkum Uttamacoḻapperā vaṭakkum mipāṟkkellai meṟpaṭiyūr Anupavayāna nirnilattukkum teṟkkaṭaiyak kāverika raiyeyuṟapponavaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai meṟpaṭiyūr Anupavamāy Araiyan tiruvaiyottināṭāḻvān parutti nilattukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa kāraikkuṭi maṇa
liṭu nilam munṟey Orumāvaraiyum taṇṭuṟai maṇaliṭu nilam Iraṇṭey mukkā ley mummāvaraiyum Āka 5 6- li Innilam Āṟuveli Innilam Āṟuveliyum maturān=takaviḷākamennum nāmattāl kalliyeṟṟiṉa maṇṇilai nikki Innilam Aṟuveliyum tiruttikkoḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Innilam Aṟuvelikkum tirut taṭaikkūli veli Oru kācāka I
nnilam Aṟuveliyināl van=ta kācu Āṟuṅkoṇṭu nāṅka yāṇṭu mutal nilan tirutti tānveṇṭu payirceytum cey muṟṟūṭṭuṇṭu puncey varicaippaṭi veli Onṟukku nellu Eṇkalamāka van=ta nellu paṇṭārakkāl paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālāl Āḻvār śrīpaṇṭārattey Aḷakkak kaṭavarākavum Ippuncey varicaiyāl vanta nellatu vanta
(ṟā) rāyam paṟai panmai paṭai veṭṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa pala pāṭṭaṅkaḷum Iṟaiya llātārākavum Innila cilliṟai coṟu māṭṭu veṭṭi muṭ ṭāvāḷ ḷiṭṭa cila kuṭimaiyum tiru kuṭimaiyum maṟṟum tiruvācalil ponta kuṭimai Uḷḷiṭṭa Epperpaṭṭa kuṭimaikaḷum yakkaṭavarallātārākavum Innilam Aṟuveliyun tirutti tiruttuvāciyāl Uḷḷa mikutikoṇṭu Irājarājan matu
rān=takatevanāna vaṟsarājar tām piṟanta janmanakṣattiram makaiyirattinānṟu maṇavāḷapperumāḷ puṟa taruḷi Ekācīti Eṇpattoru kalaicam tirumañcanam pukkaruḷi mukkalavariciyāl peruntiruvamutu ceytaruḷvataṟkum Iraṇṭu tirunāḷilum maturān=takatevan maṭattil Uṇṇum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku Aricik kum kaṟikkum Uḷḷiṭṭu tām veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkum Ivvūr nilam nilam veliyum Immatu
rān=takatevaviḷākattiluḷḷa mikutikoṇṭu cantirātittaval celvatākavum I jarājan maturān=takatevanāna vaṟsarājarkku Im maturān=takaviḷākam nila veliyum Aṭuttukkuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān tiruvaraṅkatevan Ārāvamutāna patineṭṭunāṭṭu śrīvaiyi ku sabhaikkaṇakku perumpuṟakkaṭal vāmananāṉa periyakoyil piriyan Eḻuttu Itu śrī vaiyiṣṇa varakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
